Name: Sync Incidents
Author: Admin

Parameters.Description: The name of the environment from which to sync incidents.
Palo Alto XDR API Key ID.
The number of hours to synchronize incidents prior to the current time. The default value is `24`.

JSON object that contains information about the mapping between Google SecOps and Microsoft Sentinel users. This job will sync Google SecOps assignee to Palo Alto XDR. If nothing is provided in this parameter, the user sync will not be performed.
If selected, the integration validates the SSL certificate when connecting to the Palo Alto XDR server. Enabled by default.

Description: This job synchronizes Google SecOps Alerts and Palo Alto XDR Incidents. It ensures that comments and status are kept in sync between the two systems. For the job to identify the correct information, the Google SecOps case must have the "Palo Alto XDR Incident" tag. If the alert didn’t originate from "Palo Alto Cortex XDR Connector",  you will need to add an "Incident_ID" context value to the case for the job to be able to find the correct information.
